title: What Makes Narrative-Driven Games Unforgettable?
content:
From interactive visual novels to deep story-rich RPGs, narrative design in games plays a massive role in player engagement. Tropes like slow burn character development, enemies-to-lovers arcs, and branching choices make decisions feel impactful.

When game mechanics blend seamlessly with story choices, it creates an immersive experience that keeps players coming back for dynamic endings.
